do_if.value: ((@$target.isclass.ship and $target.owner == faction.player) and @$ships.{1} != null) or (@$target.isclass.sector and @$ships.{1} != null)

@$target.isclass.station and $target.owner == faction.player and ((md.VAS_BulkCrewPromotion.ModConfig.$allActionsOnlyOnHQ and @player.headquarters and $target == player.headquarters) or not md.VAS_BulkCrewPromotion.ModConfig.$allActionsOnlyOnHQ)

set_value.name: md.VAS_BulkCrewPromotion.ModConfig.{'$' + $key}
set_value.exact: if event.param.$checked then true else false

set_value.name: global.$vas_bcp_config.{'$' + $key}
set_value.exact: if event.param.$checked then true else false
